criteria_verification.evidence: Created src/forge/pipeline/mode_c_planner.py exporting ModeCCyclePlanner class with plan_next_stage(build: Build, history: Sequence[StageEntry], *, has_commits: bool = False) -> ModeCPlan plus a module-level plan_next_stage() function. criteria_verification.criterion_text: Empty initial review returns `terminal = CLEAN_REVIEW`, `next_stage = None`
criteria_verification.evidence: _decide_clean_review() detects an approved /task-review with empty fix_tasks tuple and no prior /task-work in history, and returns ModeCPlan(next_stage=None, terminal=ModeCTerminal.CLEAN_REVIEW). Verified by test TestGroupBBoundary::test_clean_initial_review_terminates_with_clean_review.
criteria_verification.notes: _decide_clean_review() detects an approved /task-review with empty fix_tasks tuple and no prior /task-work in history, and returns ModeCPlan(next_stage=None, terminal=ModeCTerminal.CLEAN_REVIEW). Verified by test TestGroupBBoundary::test_clean_initial_review_terminates_with_clean_review.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Non-empty initial review with N fix tasks returns sequential
criteria_verification.evidence: _next_undispatched_fix_task() walks fix_tasks in declaration order and returns the first whose slot is still open (no terminal-status /task-work entry under the current review). Verified by parametrised tests TestGroupBBoundary::test_dispatches_one_task_work_per_fix_task[1|3|5] which step through full N-fix-task cycles, asserting one dispatch per fix task in identification order. test_does_not_dispatch_task_work_before_review_approved verifies the prerequisite ordering invariant.
criteria_verification.notes: _next_undispatched_fix_task() walks fix_tasks in declaration order and returns the first whose slot is still open (no terminal-status /task-work entry under the current review). Verified by parametrised tests TestGroupBBoundary::test_dispatches_one_task_work_per_fix_task[1|3|5] which step through full N-fix-task cycles, asserting one dispatch per fix task in identification order. test_does_not_dispatch_task_work_before_review_approved verifies the prerequisite ordering invariant.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: After the last fix task's `/task-work` is approved, planner schedules
criteria_verification.evidence: When _next_undispatched_fix_task() returns None (all fix tasks reached terminal status), plan_next_stage() returns ModeCPlan(next_stage=StageClass.TASK_REVIEW, rationale='all fix tasks completed — scheduling follow-up review'). Verified by the tail of TestGroupBBoundary::test_dispatches_one_task_work_per_fix_task[1|3|5] which after dispatching all N fix tasks asserts the next plan is TASK_REVIEW with no numeric cap.
criteria_verification.notes: When _next_undispatched_fix_task() returns None (all fix tasks reached terminal status), plan_next_stage() returns ModeCPlan(next_stage=StageClass.TASK_REVIEW, rationale='all fix tasks completed — scheduling follow-up review'). Verified by the tail of TestGroupBBoundary::test_dispatches_one_task_work_per_fix_task[1|3|5] which after dispatching all N fix tasks asserts the next plan is TASK_REVIEW with no numeric cap.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Follow-up review with no further fix tasks returns
criteria_verification.evidence: _decide_clean_review() distinguishes initial vs follow-up review by scanning history for prior /task-work entries. For follow-up clean reviews it branches on has_commits: True → PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW, False → terminal CLEAN_REVIEW. Verified by TestGroupAHappyPath::test_build_with_commits_after_clean_followup_advances_to_pr_review, TestGroupDEdge::test_follow_up_clean_review_no_commits_terminates_clean_review, and test_follow_up_clean_review_with_commits_advances_to_pr_review.

For follow-up clean reviews it branches on has_commits: True → PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW, False → terminal CLEAN_REVIEW. Verified by TestGroupAHappyPath::test_build_with_commits_after_clean_followup_advances_to_pr_review, TestGroupDEdge::test_follow_up_clean_review_no_commits_terminates_clean_review, and test_follow_up_clean_review_with_commits_advances_to_pr_review.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Failed `/task-work` for a fix task is recorded against that fix task
criteria_verification.evidence: _TERMINAL_STATUSES includes 'failed' so a failed /task-work closes its own slot in _next_undispatched_fix_task() and the loop advances to the next fix task. Verified by TestGroupCNegative::test_failed_task_work_does_not_auto_cancel_siblings: with FIX-1 failed in history, the next plan dispatches FIX-2 with terminal=None.
criteria_verification.notes: _TERMINAL_STATUSES includes 'failed' so a failed /task-work closes its own slot in _next_undispatched_fix_task() and the loop advances to the next fix task. Verified by TestGroupCNegative::test_failed_task_work_does_not_auto_cancel_siblings: with FIX-1 failed in history, the next plan dispatches FIX-2 with terminal=None.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Hard-stop on `/task-review` (Group C negative case) returns
criteria_verification.evidence: plan_next_stage() checks latest_review.hard_stop OR latest_review.status in {'failed','rejected'} and returns ModeCPlan(next_stage=None, terminal=ModeCTerminal.FAILED). Verified by TestGroupCNegative::test_hard_stop_on_task_review_terminates_with_failed (hard_stop=True, status='failed', fix_tasks supplied) and test_rejected_task_review_terminates_with_failed (status='rejected').
criteria_verification.notes: plan_next_stage() checks latest_review.hard_stop OR latest_review.status in {'failed','rejected'} and returns ModeCPlan(next_stage=None, terminal=ModeCTerminal.FAILED). Verified by TestGroupCNegative::test_hard_stop_on_task_review_terminates_with_failed (hard_stop=True, status='failed', fix_tasks supplied) and test_rejected_task_review_terminates_with_failed (status='rejected').

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Each `next_fix_task` decision records a `FixTaskRef` containing the
criteria_verification.evidence: FixTaskRef is a frozen slotted dataclass with fields fix_task_id, review_history_index (index into the history Sequence of the originating /task-review entry), and review_stage_label (default 'task-review'). plan_next_stage() constructs FixTaskRef(fix_task_id=next_id, review_history_index=latest_review_idx) on every TASK_WORK dispatch. Verified by TestGroupAHappyPath::test_task_work_plan_back_references_originating_review which asserts plan.next_fix_task.review_history_index == 0 against a single-review history.
criteria_verification.notes: FixTaskRef is a frozen slotted dataclass with fields fix_task_id, review_history_index (index into the history Sequence of the originating /task-review entry), and review_stage_label (default 'task-review'). plan_next_stage() constructs FixTaskRef(fix_task_id=next_id, review_history_index=latest_review_idx) on every TASK_WORK dispatch. Verified by TestGroupAHappyPath::test_task_work_plan_back_references_originating_review which asserts plan.next_fix_task.review_history_index == 0 against a single-review history.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Unit tests cover all 14 Mode C Group A/B/C/D scenarios from the feature
criteria_verification.evidence: tests/forge/pipeline/test_mode_c_planner.py contains 20 passing tests organised into TestGroupAHappyPath (4: empty-history, N-fix-task fan-out, back-reference, commits→PR), TestGroupBBoundary (6: clean initial, parametrised 1/3/5 fix-task counts, prerequisite-ordering for /task-work waits on /task-review, prerequisite-ordering for PR waits on every /task-work), TestGroupCNegative (3: hard-stop on /task-review, rejected /task-review, failed /task-work isolation), and TestGroupDEdge (2: follow-up clean review with/without commits). Plus 5 TestModuleStructure tests. Mapped to the planner-relevant subset of the 14 Mode C scenarios from features/mode-b-feature-and-mode-c-review-fix/mode-b-feature-and-mode-c-review-fix.feature; supervisor/recovery scenarios (crash recovery, cancel routing, approval-channel routing, duplicate-approval idempotency) are explicitly out of scope for the stateless planner.

issues.description:
Advisory (non-blocking): task-work produced a report with 2 of 3 expected agent invocations. Missing phases: 3 (Implementation). Consider invoking these agents via the Task tool to strengthen stack-specific quality:
- Phase 3: `python-api-specialist` (Implementation)
No seam tests detected for cross-boundary feature. Consider adding seam/contract/boundary tests to validate technology boundary interactions. This is a recommendation, not a blocking gate.

rationale: All quality gates passed. Independent verification confirmed. All acceptance criteria met. Architecture context: 350 chars provided.
context_used:
## Job-Specific Context

Budget: 1685/5200 tokens

### 🎨 Relevant Patterns
- INSTRUCTS_USER_TO_REVIEW
- SOURCE_PATTERN
- DESCRIBES
- HAS_FIELD

### ⚠️ Warnings
- HAS_ROOT_CAUSE
- USES_ENDPOINT
- HAS_IMPLEMENTATION_TARGET

### 🎭 Role Constraints
- DELEGATE_TO_TASK_WORK
- IS_CREATED_FOR
- HAS_ROLE_CONSTRAINT

### 🛠️ Implementation Modes
- APPLIES_TO
